pending_work.description: eng: pin @biomejs/biome@^2.4.12 as devDependency in package.json. Add npm run lint script. IMPLEMENTED in multiple runs. Issue #34 already created as protected-files workaround.

test: add coverage for thinking blocks, isMeta skipping, agent name enrichment, and hasMore pagination. Branch kanbanbot/test-additional-coverage-20260419. 4 new tests in test/contracts.test.js. 83 tests pass.

refactor(kanban): fix HUB_INTEGRATION region markers (// #region -> //#region) and extract KANBAN_EMPTY_ICON + renderKanbanColumn helper. Branch kanbanbot/fix-hub-region-marker-20260419. Lint/tests pass.

infrastructure_notes: safeoutputs MCP server unavailable for 10+ consecutive runs. Branches created locally cannot be pushed as PRs. 6 open KanbanBot PRs (#31-#37) await maintainer review. 2 new local branches created this run: kanbanbot/test-additional-coverage-20260419 and kanbanbot/fix-hub-region-marker-20260419.
